what_it_does: This file is a noticeboard guide item that documents a design-complete, build-not-started reusable build-prep primitive called a code-archaeology dragnet, including its purpose, design decisions, verified claims, relations to other items, open blockers, and provenance.
observations: Frontmatter declares type=guide, state=living, author_session=ch-8djrpmsl, and two sourced_from links.
An explicit HONEST-STATE line says the design is complete and advisor-checked twice, but the build has not started.
The dragnet is described as a coverage-complete, queryable repo map to run/refresh before significant builds, then synthesize from.
It is planned as a sibling ops/code_archaeology.py using cog.run_items, deliberately not editing recollection's live dragnet_extract.py.
Approach is parser-first: deterministic structural facts (AST/regex) plus LLM only for prose, to avoid hallucinated imports in the synthesis map.
Milestones are M1 (company coverage proof), M2 (field-index + registry discoverability), M3 (cross-project, designed-not-built).

Claims include that the space must be a registered Projection with embeds:True, that a field-index is needed because no existing surface answers 'all files writing FsStore', and that addressing uses code://<project>/<rel_path> with a #run= version key.
Relations listed: consumes schema_slot, reuses cog.run_items and marks-layer pattern and address grammar, gates provider-registry decisions.

Three open gaps block build: code:// disambiguation marker awaiting a keyword lock from recollection/address owner; Tim's scope confirmation of the elevated spec; chat-4b model contention around :8000.
Provenance cites commit b3a2a79, a design doc path, board items, and thread IDs.
standouts: Explicit HONEST-STATE gating of design-complete vs build-not-started.
Parser-first anti-hallucination discipline for the synthesis map.
Build held on three named external dependencies rather than proceeding speculatively.
Elevation from a provider-registry one-off to a reusable cross-project build-prep primitive.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, type, source, state, title, author_session, links, and history.
Follows the board item schema with sourced_from link kinds.
Uses address grammars such as board:// and code://.
Includes provenance with commit hash, design doc path, board item IDs, and thread IDs.
Open blockers are listed explicitly rather than omitted.
concerns: Implementation is blocked by three unresolved external dependencies, so resumption is fragile.
The parser cannot be built until the code:// disambiguation marker is locked by another owner.
Several claims are marked as verified by subagent code-read but still require re-confirmation by use.
notes: A design-handoff noticeboard item for a reusable pre-build repo-mapping primitive, gated by three unresolved external blockers.
questions: What exact artifacts does the dragnet produce and where are they persisted?
What is the concrete schema of the sibling field-index and how does it differ from the shared marks.jsonl?
What does 'chat-4b model contention (corpus bake owns :8000)' mean operationally?
Has Tim's scope confirmation been resolved since this item was filed?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to document a design-complete build-prep primitive and the reasons build has not started; the file does exactly that.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to stop agents from confidently building from partial repo knowledge by providing a reusable, coverage-complete, queryable map generated before significant builds, while transparently recording why construction is on hold.
novelty: Explicit honest-state gating and a parser-first structural-fact approach to protect synthesis maps from hallucinated imports, plus elevation of a one-off provider-registry tool into a reusable cross-project build-prep primitive.
contribution: A transparent design handoff that records decisions, unresolved blockers, and provenance so a future builder can resume without re-deriving context or over-building.
summary_for_embedding: Noticeboard guide item item-f22a919e documents a design-complete, build-not-started reusable code-archaeology dragnet intended to produce a coverage-complete, queryable repository map before significant builds.
intention_for_embedding: To hand off a build-prep primitive design while honestly surfacing the external blockers preventing implementation.
